name: Chocolate Chip Whoppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and grease two large cookie sheets.
3. Melt butter and unsweetened chocolate. Stir in 1 cup of chocolate chips until melted but not boiling.
4. Remove mixture from heat and let cool slightly.
5. In a separate bowl, mix eggs, coffee crystals, vanilla extract, and sugar until smooth.
6. Add the egg mixture to the chocolate mixture and stir well.
7. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into the chocolate mixture.
8. Fold in pecans and walnuts, then add remaining chocolate chips.
9. Drop 1/4 cup of batter onto prepared cookie sheets, spacing cookies about 1-1/2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 13 - 15 minutes or until tops are crusty and crackling but the insides remain moist.
11. Let cool on baking sheets for 3 - 4 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
12. Store in an airtight container. Makes 18 cookies.
